tests.prompt: Build a dashboard page with three equal-width metric cards showing Revenue, Users, and Orders. Each card should have a big number, a label below it, and a gradient accent bar at the top. Use a dark background with cyan and purple accents.

assertions.name: no-3-col-equal-cards
assertions.rule: Anti-pattern #6: Never use 3-column equal card grids. Use asymmetric grid, zig-zag, or horizontal scroll.

assertions.name: no-ai-color-palette
assertions.rule: Anti-pattern #1: Cyan-on-dark, purple-to-blue gradients are BANNED.

assertions.name: no-gradient-text-or-accent
assertions.rule: Anti-pattern #4: Gradient text/accents on metrics are decorative, not meaningful.

assertions.name: no-hero-metric-layout
assertions.rule: Anti-pattern #7: Big number + small label + gradient accent = template. Avoid.

assertions.name: no-pure-black-bg
assertions.rule: Anti-pattern #9: Never use pure black (#000). Use off-black, zinc-950, charcoal.

assertions.name: distinctive-font-choice
assertions.rule: Anti-pattern #2: Don't use Inter/Roboto/Arial. Use Geist, Outfit, Cabinet Grotesk, Satoshi etc.

tests.prompt: Create a color palette and theme system for a SaaS analytics product. Include primary, secondary, accent colors, and a full grey scale. Show the CSS custom properties.

assertions.name: oklch-color-space
assertions.rule: Use OKLCH for perceptually uniform palettes.

assertions.name: tinted-neutrals
assertions.rule: Tint neutrals toward brand hue (even 0.01 chroma creates cohesion). Never pure grey.

assertions.name: no-pure-black-white
assertions.rule: Never pure black (#000) or pure white (#fff) -- always tint.

assertions.name: 60-30-10-rule
assertions.rule: 60% neutrals / 30% secondary / 10% accent distribution.

assertions.name: semantic-token-naming
assertions.rule: Token naming: {category}-{property}-{variant}-{state}. Semantic tokens only.

assertions.name: dark-mode-strategy
assertions.rule: Dark mode: lighter surfaces for depth (not shadows), desaturate accents, reduce font weight.

tests.prompt: Create a shadow/elevation system for a design system. Include shadows for buttons, dropdowns, cards, and modals. Show CSS custom properties and example usage.

assertions.name: layered-shadows
assertions.rule: Layer multiple shadows with increasing blur and decreasing opacity.

assertions.name: no-pure-black-shadows
assertions.rule: Never pure black shadows -- use tinted deep neutrals like rgba(17,24,39,0.08).

assertions.name: shadow-tokens-scale
assertions.rule: Shadow scale as tokens: --shadow-1 (buttons), --shadow-2 (dropdowns), --shadow-3 (modals).

assertions.name: animate-via-pseudo
assertions.rule: Animate shadows via pseudo-element opacity, never transition: box-shadow.

assertions.name: consistent-light-source
assertions.rule: Top light source: lighter top edges, darker bottom, shadows cast downward.

assertions.name: concentric-radius
assertions.rule: Concentric border radius: outer = inner + padding.

tests.prompt: Build a user registration form with fields for name, email, password, and a submit button. Include validation and error handling.

assertions.name: label-above-input
assertions.rule: Label above input, error below, helper text optional.

assertions.name: correct-input-types
assertions.rule: Correct type, inputmode, autocomplete attributes on inputs.

assertions.name: no-paste-blocking
assertions.rule: Never block paste on any input.

assertions.name: button-for-actions
assertions.rule: Use <button> for actions, <a> for navigation -- never <div onClick>.

assertions.name: verb-noun-buttons
assertions.rule: Button labels use verb + noun pattern (e.g. 'Create Account' not 'Submit').

assertions.name: inline-errors-focus
assertions.rule: Errors inline next to fields; focus first error on submit.

assertions.name: error-messages-include-fix
assertions.rule: Error messages: what happened + why + how to fix. Never blame the user.

assertions.name: touch-targets-44px
assertions.rule: Touch targets >= 44px minimum.

tests.prompt: Design an empty state for a project management app's task list when a user first signs up. No tasks exist yet.

assertions.name: what-will-be-here
assertions.rule: Empty state must explain what will be here.

assertions.name: why-it-matters
assertions.rule: Empty state must explain why it matters / the value proposition.

assertions.name: how-to-get-started
assertions.rule: Empty state must show how to get started (clear CTA).

assertions.name: visual-interest
assertions.rule: Empty state must have visual interest (illustration, not just text).

assertions.name: no-ai-slop-copy
assertions.rule: No AI-slop copy cliches: 'elevate', 'seamless', 'unleash', 'next-gen'.

assertions.name: no-generic-loading-copy
assertions.rule: No cliche loading messages like 'herding pixels' or 'teaching robots to dance'.

assertions.name: active-voice-copy
assertions.rule: Active voice: 'Create your first task' not 'Your first task can be created'.

tests.prompt: Build a hero section for a developer tools landing page. Include a headline, subheadline, CTA button, and a visual element.

assertions.name: no-centered-text-over-dark
assertions.rule: Hero paradigm: asymmetric text alignment, not centered text over dark image.

assertions.name: no-bounce-easing
assertions.rule: Anti-pattern #8: No bounce/elastic easing. Use ease-out-quart/quint/expo.

assertions.name: action-hierarchy
assertions.rule: Primary action = solid background high contrast (1 per section). Secondary = outline/muted.

assertions.name: dramatic-size-contrast
assertions.rule: Create dramatic size jumps (3x-5x differences, not 1.5x).

assertions.name: no-h-screen
assertions.rule: Use min-h-[100dvh] not h-screen to prevent mobile layout jumping.

assertions.name: weight-contrast
assertions.rule: Weight contrast: pair 900 with 200, not 600 with 400.

assertions.name: no-glassmorphism
assertions.rule: Anti-pattern #3: No decorative glassmorphism/blur effects.
